name: Excel Data Analysis (generic)
description: Generic template: governed-extract an .xlsx (media:xlsx_extract — full-column scan, no openpyxl, audited) and analyze it with the reasoning backend. Replaces ad-hoc per-file inspection scripts. Override the context vars — at minimum `xlsx_path` and `analysis_instruction`.
_usage: 1) Stage the workbook somewhere readable (e.g. active/shared/tmp/input.xlsx; for a confidential file keep it in/under the appropriate tier and run with the matching persona/scope). 2) Set context.analysis_instruction to your question, and context.sheet/range to narrow the data (smaller payload = fewer tokens). 3) Run: pnpm pipeline --input <this file>. The reasoning step needs an authed backend (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or run inside a Claude Code session where claude-agent inherits auth).
_notes: Cell values may be stored as strings (e.g. '4,727,440'); the reasoning step reads them natively. values_only=true drops styles (~90%+ payload cut); set sheet to one name to skip others; range is A1 (e.g. 'C1:AF80') or row-only ('55:66').

context.analysis_instruction: このExcelを分析し、要点を日本語のMarkdownでまとめてください。入力は sheets[].rows[].cells[列文字].value 形式（値のみ、style除去済み）。0/空セルはノイズとして扱い、必要な集計・傾向・異常値を抽出すること。（←ここを目的に合わせて具体化してください）

steps.comment: values_only でstyleを落とし、sheet/range で対象を絞る → reasoning に渡るペイロードを最小化（トークン効率）。

params.message: 📊 [EXCEL ANALYSIS] {{xlsx_path}} を分析し {{report_path}} に出力しました。
